ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ospfv3_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OSPFv3 area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the OSPFv3 area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the OSPFv3 area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the area was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the area was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the area (e.g., active, disabled) */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of the area (e.g., standard, NSSA, stub) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "address_aggregates" (
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address aggregate */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area */,
  "aggregate_name" TEXT /* Name of the address aggregate */,
  "lsdb_type" INTEGER /* Type of the Address Aggregate (interAreaPrefixLsa, nssaExternalLsa) */,
  "prefix_type" INTEGER /* Type of the prefix (unknown, ipv4, ipv6, dns) */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* The IPv6 Prefix */,
  "prefix_length" INTEGER /* The length of the prefix (in bits) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the address aggregate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the aggregate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the aggregate was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the aggregate (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "metric" INTEGER /* Metric value for the aggregate */,
  "tag" INTEGER /* Tag value for the aggregate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_aggregates_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_aggregates_prefix FOREIGN KEY ("prefix") REFERENCES prefixes ("prefix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_aggregates_lsdb_type FOREIGN KEY ("lsdb_type") REFERENCES lsdb_types ("lsdb_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_address_aggregates_prefix_type FOREIGN KEY ("prefix_type") REFERENCES prefix_types ("prefix_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lsdb_types" (
  "lsdb_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OSPFv3 Lsdb type */,
  "lsdb_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the OSPFv3 Lsdb type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the OSPFv3 Lsdb type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the Lsdb type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the Lsdb type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lsdb_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prefix_types" (
  "prefix_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OSPFv3 prefix type */,
  "prefix_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the OSPFv3 prefix type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the OSPFv3 prefix type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prefix type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prefix type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prefix_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prefixes" (
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OSPFv3 prefix */,
  "prefix" TEXT /* The OSPFv3 prefix */,
  "prefix_length" INTEGER /* The length of the prefix (in bits) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the OSPFv3 prefix */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prefix was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the prefix was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the prefix (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prefix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the configuration */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area being accessed */,
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address aggregate being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the OSPFv3 configuration was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_aggregate_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_id") REFERENCES address_aggregates ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the change */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area being changed */,
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address aggregate being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the OSPFv3 configuration was changed */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user making the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_aggregate_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_id") REFERENCES address_aggregates ("aggregate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring event */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area being monitored */,
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address aggregate being monitored */,
  "monitoring_date" TEXT /* Date when the monitoring data was collected */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics related to OSPFv3 configurations */,
  "anomaly_detected" INTEGER /* Indicates if an anomaly was detected during monitoring */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the monitoring data (e.g., tool name, sensor) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the monitoring event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_monitoring_aggregate_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_id") REFERENCES address_aggregates ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_monitoring_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area being reported on */,
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address aggregate being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance report was generated */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the OSPFv3 configuration */,
  "violation_details" TEXT /* Details of any violations found */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who reviewed the report */,
  "reviewed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_aggregate_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_id") REFERENCES address_aggregates ("aggregate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area being notified */,
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address aggregate being notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, warning, info) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the notification */,
  "sent_to" TEXT /* Email address or other contact method for the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_aggregate_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_id") REFERENCES address_aggregates ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_backup" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration backup */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area being backed up */,
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address aggregate being backed up */,
  "backup_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration backup was taken */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* Backup data of the OSPFv3 configuration */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the backup */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backup (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "restored_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the backup was last restored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_backup_aggregate_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_id") REFERENCES address_aggregates ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_backup_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scheduled_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled task */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the OSPFv3 area for the task */,
  "aggregate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the address aggregate for the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (e.g., config update, monitoring, compliance check) */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date when the task is scheduled to run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the task was last run */,
  "next_run" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the task is scheduled to run next */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_tasks_aggregate_id FOREIGN KEY ("aggregate_id") REFERENCES address_aggregates ("aggregate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scheduled_tasks_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES ospfv3_areas ("area_id")
)
